examples: The night was hot and airless.
This was a small airless house and in the corner he discovered a water pump. He was so excited and went forward to draw water, but no water came out no matter how hard he tried.
It was hot and airless in the apartment, but he was shivering.
"Mmm, " the kids say, before we walk into our airless apartment with its cold stove.
But now all the summits are held in Brussels and we are trapped in an airless basement.
